🌊 Swell: 2.6m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 18.0km/h ENE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 37.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind

programme.desc:
